description_long: This object is a rectangular keyboard with a flat, low-profile design and a grid of evenly spaced keys on its upper surface. The keys appear to be slightly raised and uniformly distributed, suggesting a modern, minimalist style. The body is slim, with a consistent thickness and sharp, clean edges, likely made from plastic or a lightweight metal. The surface has a matte, slightly textured finish, reducing glare and fingerprints. There are no visible cables, ports, or branding on any side, giving it a seamless appearance. The underside is plain, with no visible feet or stands, and the overall color is a uniform light gray.
description: A slim, rectangular keyboard with a grid of evenly spaced, slightly raised keys and a matte light gray finish. The design is minimalist, with no visible branding or cables.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full grid of keys and the flat, rectangular profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the keyboard's slim thickness and the uniform height of the keys.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same grid of keys and flat profile visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and consistent key height.
